title: Back of the Envelope Rental Property Calculator
explanation: A quick mental model lets investors estimate cash flow without complex spreadsheets.

cells:
price = 200_000
rent = 1500
interest_rate = 0.05
years = 30
down_pct = 20
# loan amount
loan = price * (1 - down_pct/100)
# monthly payment using amortization formula
n = years*12
monthly_payment = loan * (interest_rate/12) / (1 - (1 + interest_rate/12)**(-n))
# monthly cash flow after mortgage
net_cash_flow = rent - monthly_payment
print(f"Monthly payment: ${monthly_payment:,.2f}")
print(f"Net cash flow: ${net_cash_flow:,.2f}")
